purpose: Owner-facing public-release metadata checklist for finalizing license and citation files.

required_decisions.why_it_matters: External users need explicit reuse, modification, and redistribution terms.

required_decisions.decision: Replace placeholder author metadata in CITATION.cff.
required_decisions.why_it_matters: Citation metadata must identify artifact authors before public release.

required_decisions.decision: Add public repository URL to CITATION.cff.
required_decisions.why_it_matters: Reviewers and users need a stable source-code location.

required_decisions.decision: Set the CITATION.cff license field to the selected license identifier.
required_decisions.why_it_matters: Citation tooling expects machine-readable license metadata.

license_options.fit: Permissive software/data-adjacent artifact reuse with minimal obligations.
license_options.owner_note: Simple and common; does not include explicit patent grant.

license_options.fit: Permissive reuse with explicit patent license and NOTICE handling.
license_options.owner_note: Often preferred for larger open-source projects and industry use.
May be appropriate for documentation/data, but not usually ideal as the only software-code license.

citation_template.title: FounderBench: Evaluating LLM Agents on Sequential Startup Decisions
citation_template.message: If you use FounderBench, please cite the associated paper or this software artifact.

authors.name: <replace with author name or ORCID-aware author object>

citation_template.abstract: FounderBench is a controlled startup-agent benchmark for evaluating LLM agents on repeated business decisions under bounded resources.
citation_template.license: <SPDX license id selected by project owner>

finalization_steps: Choose one license identifier and add the corresponding full LICENSE text to work/founderbench/LICENSE.
Use work/founderbench/LICENSE.template only as a guide; it is not a substitute for the final LICENSE file.
Replace placeholder author metadata in work/founderbench/CITATION.cff.
Use work/founderbench/CITATION.cff.template only as a guide; it is not a substitute for finalized citation metadata.
Replace repository-code with the public repository URL.
Set the CITATION.cff license field to the selected SPDX identifier.
Remove or update LICENSE-TODO.md so it no longer states that no public release license has been selected.
Run python -m founderbench.release regenerate and python -m founderbench.release validate.
guardrails: This artifact does not select a license or author list for the owner.
Template files are intentionally non-final and must not be treated as release metadata.
Do not publish the package as open source until work/founderbench/LICENSE exists and CITATION.cff placeholders are replaced.
If code and documentation/data use different licenses, state both clearly in README and CITATION metadata.
